AI Workflow Automation

Automate Repetitive Work.
Multiply Your Output.

We build AI-powered automation systems that eliminate repetitive tasks, streamline business processes, and allow your team to focus on high-value work. From CRM workflows to document processing to full AI agent deployments.

80%

24/7

AI runs non-stop

Automation Services

From simple triggers to complex multi-step AI workflows — we automate it all.

CRM Automation

Auto-assign leads, trigger follow-up sequences, update pipeline stages, and notify sales reps based on behavior signals.

Email Automation

Multi-step email sequences triggered by actions — sign-ups, purchases, abandoned carts, and more.

Document Processing

Extract data from invoices, contracts, and forms using AI — no manual data entry.

Lead Qualification

AI agent scores and qualifies inbound leads 24/7, then routes them to the right team member.

Appointment Scheduling

Fully automated booking system that integrates with your calendar and sends confirmations.

RAG Systems

Retrieval-Augmented Generation systems that answer questions from your business documents and databases.

AI Workflows

Multi-step AI workflows connecting your tools — from triggers to actions across your entire stack.

LLM Integrations

Integrate GPT-4, Claude, Gemini, and other LLMs into your product or internal workflows.

MCP Servers

Model Context Protocol servers that give AI agents access to your business data and tools.
